questionHtml:
What are the signs of ΔHΘ and ΔSΘ for the reaction, which is spontaneous at low temperature and non-spontaneous at very high temperature?

ΔGΘ = ΔHΘ − TΔSΘ

SO3 (g) + CaO (s) → CaSO4 (s)

meta.title: What are the signs of ΔHΘ and ΔSΘ for the reaction, which is spontaneous at low temperature and non-spontaneous at very high temperature? ΔGΘ = ΔHΘ − TΔSΘ SO3 (g) + CaO (s) → CaSO4
